title: nama rotundifolia
intro: Nama rotundifolia, also known as desert marigold, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, characterized by its bright yellow or orange flowers. The medicinal properties of Nama rotundifolia lie in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral agent, making it effective in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits associated with Nama rotundifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and insomnia, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Nama rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it accessible for consumption and topical application in the form of salves and creams.
